title: Minor client fixes
description: This mod is a mod that fixes minor bugs in the vanilla game that mojang did not fix
body:
Minor Client Fixes is a Minecraft mod that improves small bugs in vanilla Minecraft. This mod is helpful for the user if they want to have some quite minor bugs fixed.

Bugs Fixed:

  • MC-61489 - Book GUI is not vertically centered
  • MC-210318 - Maximum length of book title changed from 16 to 15 characters
  • MC-227169 - The main hand is positioned incorrectly when holding a loaded crossbow in your offhand
  • MC-215531 - (Still being worked on)
  • MC-245394 - The sounds of raid horns blaring aren't controlled by the correct sound slider
